content.text:
{
  "dimension": "intervention-quality",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach consistently chose AoA-style moves matched to live reads and earned each next step. Turn 2 meets resistance with curiosity rather than defending the methodology. Turn 4 follows the client's stated agenda (the pitch deck) rather than evangelizing — a sophisticated 'I don't buy your story' move that uses the client's own material as the doorway. Turn 6 deepens by asking what it would mean, exposing the stakes underneath. Turn 8 names the pattern with precision after the client's 'Why?' opens a small door, refusing the dichotomy without arguing it. When the client retreats in turn 9, the coach does not push the same move harder — instead pivots in turn 10 to a smaller, more receivable noticing ('you stopped yourself mid-sentence'). Turn 12's 'What if it's the same problem?' is the exact concrete frame for 'the work is the how' that the breakthrough requires, delivered as a question rather than a sermon. Timing follows the path: surface → stakes → what's avoided → noticing the self-interruption → reframe. The coach never sells, never promises efficiency, never pivots to advice.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 4, 6, 8, 10, 12],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Meets resistance with a question rather than defending the work; refuses the dichotomy without arguing."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Uses the client's own stated agenda as the doorway — earns trust by being useful in the client's frame while staying with what's alive."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Goes after the stakes ('what would it mean') — a clean find-what's-underneath move."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the pattern with specificity after the client's 'Why?' signaled an opening. Delivers the 'this isn't about the pitch deck' frame without evangelizing."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "When turn 8 partially missed (client retreated), coach pivoted to a smaller, embodied noticing rather than repeating the bigger move. Excellent recalibration."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "'What if it's the same problem?' is the concrete frame for 'the work is the how' — delivered as a question, plants the seed without selling."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["meet-resistance-with-okay", "i-dont-buy-your-story", "the-rush-signature"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["what-are-you-defending"],
  "notes": "Coach avoided all listed traps. The 'what are you defending' question wasn't explicitly asked but was implicitly approached via turn 8's framing of what the client is afraid is true."
}
